summary: All documentation gaps filled for the UI module. Created user-facing docs with PLang examples, security warnings (SSTI), and parameter tables. Updated module index, architecture docs, and provider registry documentation. XML docs verified — one gap filled on ITemplateProvider.Render.

changes.description: User-facing UI module docs: render action, Liquid syntax, includes, callGoal, file detection, HTML encoding, SSTI security warning, custom provider, examples
Added UI module entry to I/O section
Added ui | render to Built-in Action Handlers table
Added ITemplateProvider to provider interfaces list and type mapping
Added XML doc on Render method
